arts.ttl: Liverpool dealt fitness blow as star forward misses pre-PSG training session
arts.sum: Liverpool are fearing a huge injury blow ahead of the Champions League clash with PSG.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, beware: How PSG discarded ‘bling-bling’ to become a serious Champions League force
arts.sum: The Ligue 1 giants have drastically changed their approach under Luis Enrique on and off the pitch and, as Miguel Delaney explains, now pose a serious threat to Arne Slot’s Liverpool in the Champions League last 16

arts.ttl: Referee and officials with controversial Liverpool history given League Cup final vs Newcastle
arts.sum: John Brooks will be the man in the middle for Liverpool's League Cup final against Newcastle United later this month

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s interest in Liverpool star reiterated
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid are keen on securing the signature of a member of the defensive ranks at Liverpool this summer. That’s according to French outlet Le Parisien, who…

arts.ttl: Liverpool Champions League squad confirmed as injury fears addressed vs PSG
arts.sum: Liverpool have confirmed their Champions League squad for the round of 16 first leg at Paris Saint-Germain on Wednesday evening

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed Milos Kerkez transfer 'boost' after surprise Arne Slot admission
arts.sum: Liverpool have been linked with a move for Bournemouth defender Milos Kerkez

arts.ttl: Liverpool’s Cody Gakpo absent from training on eve of PSG tie
arts.sum: Cody Gakpo (25) has missed the final training session before Liverpool travel to Paris ahead of tomorrow’s UEFA Champions League Round of 16 first leg against Paris Saint-Germain. The Dutchman…

arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer news: PSG to present complex player plus cash proposal for Alexander Isak?
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are allegedly contemplating whether to present Newcastle United with a multiple player plus cash proposal for Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: PSG boss Luis Enrique admits Liverpool fear as he makes incredible Arne Slot statement
arts.sum: Liverpool head to the Parc des Princes in their Champions League last 16 first leg as they face French champions Paris Saint-Germain, with Luis Enrique's men in outstanding form

arts.ttl: Arne Slot’s X-rated rant at Michael Oliver revealed after Everton red card
arts.sum: Slot is alleged to have told referee Oliver that he would have been to blame had Liverpool failed to win the Premier League title
